permissions.title: What Nudge does (and doesn't)
permissions.subtitle: Full transparency before we start.

canDo.title: Nudge can:
items: Translate technical terms into plain language
Monitor your safety and alert you
Teach you about crypto at your pace

permissions.readOnly: Read-only access. Your funds always stay under your control.

quiz.title: Let's get to know you
quiz.subtitle: 5 quick questions. There are no right or wrong answers.

options.other: Someone else set it up for me
options.together: I did it with someone's help

q2.question: If SOL's price dropped 20% today, what would you do?

options.unsure: I don't know what I'd do
options.hold: Nothing, it's part of the game

q3.question: How often do you check your crypto positions?

options.knows: I know what it is and I track it
options.heard: I've heard of it but don't really know

q5.question: What do you want from Nudge?
q5.hint: You can pick more than one.

options.safety: Know if my money is safe

profile.title: Your Nudge profile
profile.subtitle: Based on your answers, we identified where you are:

actions.teachPace: Teach you concepts at your pace
actions.alertClearly: Alert you clearly when you need to pay attention

iniciante.label: #beginner
iniciante.description: You're just starting — and that's OK. Nudge will translate every concept for you.

delegadora.label: #delegator
delegadora.description: You tend to rely on someone else for financial decisions. Nudge will help you gain autonomy, step by step.

indecisa-sob-pressao.label: #indecisive-under-pressure
indecisa-sob-pressao.description: In tense moments, you freeze. Nudge will show you real data to help you decide calmly.

negligente.label: #neglectful
negligente.description: You forget to check your positions. Nudge will take care of that and alert you when it matters.

avessa-a-jargao.label: #jargon-averse
avessa-a-jargao.description: Technical terms paralyze you. Nudge will never use jargon without translating first.

quer-seguranca.label: #wants-safety
quer-seguranca.description: You want peace of mind with your money. Nudge monitors everything and alerts you when needed.

curiosa.label: #curious
curiosa.description: You want to learn! Nudge will bring educational content at your pace.

calma-sob-pressao.label: #calm-under-pressure
calma-sob-pressao.description: You don't panic. Nudge will reinforce your confidence with real data.

autonoma-inicial.label: #early-autonomous
autonoma-inicial.description: You've already taken the first steps on your own. Nudge will help you go further.

semi-autonoma.label: #semi-autonomous
semi-autonoma.description: You started with someone's help — great beginning. Nudge helps you take the next steps alone.

intermediaria.label: #intermediate
intermediaria.description: You already have a solid foundation. Nudge will show you more detailed data.

reativa.label: #reactive
reativa.description: You tend to act on impulse. Nudge will show you real data before any decision.

atenta.label: #attentive
atenta.description: You follow the market. Nudge will complement your attention with smart alerts.

exploradora.label: #explorer
exploradora.description: You seek new opportunities. Nudge will help you explore safely.

registration.title: ON-CHAIN REGISTRATION
registration.subtitle: Register your profile on the Solana blockchain as proof of your Nudge.
registration.error: Registration failed. Your wallet may have rejected the transaction.
